change_summary: Implement AES-GCM encryption for cloud sync payload using Argon2/PBKDF2 derived key from a user passphrase.
acceptance_tests: Test encryption/decryption roundtrip yields original data
Test incorrect passphrase throws decryption error

change_summary: Secure sync endpoints with JWT/Session auth and rate limiting. Ensure it only accepts encrypted blobs.
acceptance_tests: Valid sync payload updates remote dataVersion

change_summary: Enhance timezone handling for multi-leg flights crossing datelines. Ensure arrival nights are calculated based on local destination time.
acceptance_tests: Flight crossing International Date Line correctly flags gap on arrival date
Same-day check-in and checkout does not trigger false gap

change_summary: Add user consent modal for AI parsing prior to first use, storing consent in useUIStore.
acceptance_tests: User must click 'Agree' before paste-parse works
Consent state is persisted across reloads

change_summary: Implement BackgroundSync for offline edits, ensuring queued mutations (like Add Trip) sync when connectivity returns.
acceptance_tests: Trip syncs automatically upon regaining network connection

change_summary: Add robust error handling for Anthropic API timeouts and malformed JSON responses from the LLM.
acceptance_tests: Malformed JSON triggers deterministic fallback parser

change_summary: Create Capacitor configuration for iOS App Store submission, including appId, bundled WebDir, and plugin configs.
acceptance_tests: npx cap sync ios runs successfully
App builds in Xcode without missing configuration
